text_block_list.name: Sky's Classmate
text_block_list.text:
Oh, hey, Sei! The Droit's tomorrow, huh? I decided to go too! Good
luck!

text_block_list.name: Older Student
text_block_list.text:
Sky, I heard you're performing with Fuji. I'm so jealous. I can't wait to
see your dance.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Wow, feel that pressure. Maybe I need to make a break for it.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Everyone should start the year having fun... And I'll do everything I
can to make that happen.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But never mind. I knew that together, you and I would be able to
bring the biggest smiles to everyone.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: (It's just not my kinda show. I like betraying expectations, not giving people a fun time, much less making them smile...)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uuunngh... Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now then... our honeymoon has come to an end. Sadly, this will be
our last lesson. Today we'll iron out the details and get ready for
tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
We've come along pretty well with the routine I first suggested. Is
there anything you'd like to go over before it's too late?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Sure, just one thing. Can we call the whole thing off?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Uh... What?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, you know, I just feel like quitting.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: I really don't like living up to people's expectations. I'd rather... do a dance that's more me.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: ...Sky!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We'll have to start over from scratch, if that's okay with you. So,
would you go to the dance with me?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yes! I'd love to! Everyone's going to love this surprise dance!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (...They're actually dancing. Weird...)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's partner dancing? ...Wow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Ah! That was...

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Yeah! That was fantastic! It really packs a surprise! Hehe, I think I could like this a lot.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Now there's just the song. Classical's the norm, but... that's too rigid
for the dance we just did.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Although, something too poppy wouldn't fit the Droit at all. There
must be some kind of middle ground...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Sampling maybe? It needs a classical vibe... so they don't want to
axe the strings.)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Actually, the track I'm making now could work. So long as they don't
ask for a live orchestra or something crazy, it just needs some
tweaking...)

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: You know, we don't even need a song.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What do you mean you don't need one?!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Shakur! Are you okay? I wasn't expecting you.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Don't even ask! Seiun Sky, did I just hear you say "we don't even need
a song"?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh, yeah, I mean...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: That's going way too far. Some rules are there for a reason. There's no rhythm to get into without sound. If you're looking for something to match that dance you did...

text_block_list.name: Fuji & Sky
text_block_list.text: Wooow!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Try dancing to this. I'll fix it up.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: (Yeah... This is it.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That was really good! It felt so great to dance to. Right, Sky?

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I didn't know you composed music. Do you by chance... put anything
online?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Nope.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Having Shakur's help with this is tremendous! There's no time to lose.
Let's practice as hard as we can!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The night of the Ligne Droite...

text_block_list.name: Student Council General Manager
text_block_list.text:
And so, thanks to the new additions and extra announcements, there
are more attendees than ever before!

text_block_list.name: Symboli Rudolf
text_block_list.text: Good... Thank you for the report. Let's make our way to the hall now.

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
May I have your attention, please! It's almost time for the feature of
the night, the partner dance, to begin!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text:
There's just one thing before that... This year's Droit will be a little
different than before! I present to you the pair who will be doing a
special exhibition dance!

text_block_list.name: Host
text_block_list.text: Fuji Kiseki and Seiun Sky!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Will all your effort have been worth it? Time to find out.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hm?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
(Damn it. Why'd I stick my neck out? Those two kept me busy until
the very last moment!)

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I had to eat a ton of ramen to get that live orchestra. This better be
good.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Okay... Ready to go, my lovely date?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Hehe, let's have some fun!
